Imagine a world where your app lives on a single blockchain but seamlessly taps into the liquidity of other networks. That’s now possible with Somnia®
Join Airdrop
Somnia®
A 300k+tps EVM Layer 1 with Interoperability Protocols to unify metaverses, gaming, NFTs, and social platforms, creating a seamless, fully on-chain Virtual Society.
An advanced Layer 1 blockchain designed to power a decentralized and interconnected digital ecosystem. At its core, Somnia offers a suite of omnichain protocols that seamlessly connect different metaverses, paving the way for a new era of virtual experiences. By enabling interoperability across various virtual worlds, Somnia fosters a unified digital society where users can freely traverse and interact across different platforms.
